publicationstmt.publisher: Medical Historical Library, Cushing/Whitney Medical Library

maintenanceagency.agencyname: Medical Historical Library, Cushing/Whitney Medical Library

descriptivenote.p: Finding aid description and metadata in Archives at Yale are licensed under a CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. This means that anyone may copy, modify, and distribute this descriptive metadata without restriction or permission. The CC0 license is explained in full on the Creative Commons website: CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. More information is available on our Help page.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Wednesday April 2, 2025 at 22:00

corpname.part: Medical Historical Library, Cushing/Whitney Medical Library

did.abstract: This collection of postcards circa 1900-1960 includes items from medical institutions in Connecticut including general hospitals, private hospitals, psychiatric hospitals, sanatoria, and the Yale School of Medicine, grouped by location. The collection also includes postcards on medical themes from World War I and miscellaneous other topics.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The collection is open for research.

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: Provenance of items in the collection includes purchases from multiple vendors, 2002-2007; gifts of William Helfand, date unknown, Jodi Marra, 1999, and Michael Albert, 2007; and items of unknown provenance.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Medical postcards collection. Historical Library, Harvey Cushing / John Hay Whitney Medical Library, Yale University.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Copyright status for collection materials is unknown. Transmission or reproduction of materials protected by U.S. Copyright Law (Title 17, U.S.C.) beyond that allowed by fair use requires the written permission of the copyright owners. Works not in the public domain cannot be commercially exploited without permission of the copyright owners. Responsibility for any use rests exclusively with the user.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Color. Inscription: A-71513; C.T. American Art.

corpname.part: Souvenir Post Card Company (New York and Berlin)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Color. Inscription: 2732; Souvenir Post Card Co., New York and Berlin.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Color with white border. Inscription: A-63104; C.T. American Art.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Color, stamp, message, postmarked 1906. Inscription: Handcolored.; H 52996; L.R. Hazen. (Germany.) Cromwell Hall was a private hospital run by a physician.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Color with white borders. Inscription: Pub. by Danziger & Berman, New Haven, Connecticut; New Process-Chrom.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Color with white borders. Inscription: 12037; Published by Morris Berman, New Haven, Connecticut Made in U.S.A. ; New Process-Chrom.

did.unittitle: Deaf and Dumb Asylum. Hartford, Connecticut

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Name, no address or message. Inscription: No. 1439; Published by the Chapin News Company (Incorporated), Hartford, Connecticut; Leipzig-Berlin.

corpname.part: American School, at Hartford, for the Deaf

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Handcolored. Inscription: 5178; Published by the Chapin News (Incorporated) Hartford Connecticut, Leipzig, Dresden; Poly-Chrome.

did.unittitle: Hartford Hospital, Main Entrance. Hartford, Connecticut

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Color. Inscription: 215799; Pub. by Midas & Hahn, New Haven, Connecticut; Made in USA.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Color. Inscription: 17,759; A "Colourpicture" Publication, Boston, Mass., U.S.A.; Sold by Capitol Novelty Co. Hartford, Conn.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Handcolored; message; stamp, postmarked 1913. Inscription: The Leighton & Valentine Co., New York City, U.S.A. L-622.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Color; stamp: message to "Mr. Alfred Martin"; postmarked 1908. No publication information.

did.unittitle: Veranda, Untercliff Sanitoriam (Undercliff Sanatorium). Meriden Connecticut

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Color; message, postmarked 1914. Inscription: Publ. by The August Schmelzer Co., Meriden, Connecticut No. 282 Made in Germany.

did.unittitle: Main Building, Asylum for Insane. Middletown, Connecticut

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Inscription: Greaves' Art Store; Printed in Germany.; Raphael Tuck & Sons' Post Card Series No. 2082; Middletown, Connecticut; Art publishers to their Majesties the King and Queen.

did.unittitle: Main Building, Connecticut Hospital for Insane. Middletown, Connecticut

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Color. Inscription: 16990; Made in Germany. The Robbins Bros Co., Boston, Mass.

did.unittitle: Middle Building, Connecticut Hospital for the Insane. Middletown, Connecticut

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Handcolored. Inscription: 10750.; Lucius R. Hazen, Middletown, Connecticut (Germany.)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Color; message; stamp. Inscription: A65828; Publ. by The August Schmelzer Co., Meriden, Connecticut No. 33 Made in Germany.

did.unittitle: Dr B. Austin Cheney's Sanatorium. New Haven, Connecticut

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Written on front "my room" with indicator line. Inscription: The Rotograph Co. N.Y. City; Printed in Germany; 50341.

corpname.part: Dr B. Austin Cheney's Sanatorium (New Haven, Conn.)
Metropolitan News and Publishing Co. (Boston, Massachusetts)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Color; message. Inscription: The Metropolitan News and Publishing Co., Boston, Mass. and Germany; No. G 15 002.; Made in Germany. Shows original building (North Building) of hospital.

did.unittitle: The Elm City Private Hospital. New Haven, Connecticut

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Color; message; stamp; postmarked 1910. Inscription: Published by the Beck Manufacturing Co., New Haven, Connecticut; No. 1212 ; Made in Germany. This private hospital building was later used by Yale for the School/Department of Public Health and for a nurses' dormitory.

corpname.part: Elm City Private Hospital (New Haven, Connecticut)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Color. Inscription: 619; Pub. by Danziger & Berman, New Haven, Connecticut.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Color. Inscription: SL & Co.; E 6304; Germany.

did.unittitle: Memorial Unit, Grace-New Haven Community Hospital. New Haven, Connecticut

corpname.part: Natural Color Cards Co. (Ridgefield Park, New Jersey)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Color. Inscription: 73332; Pub. by NATCO Natural Color Cards Co., Ridgefield Park, N.J.; Made by Dexter West Nyack, N.Y.

did.unittitle: New Haven Hospital. New Haven, Connecticut

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Inscription: Copyright 1905 by the Rotograph Co.; 3146; The Rotograph Co., N. Y. City (Germany.) Shows original hospital building (North Building) facing Cedar Street.

did.unittitle: New Haven Hospital. New Haven, Connecticut

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Message, stamp, postmarked 1905. Inscription: Copyright 1905 by the Rotograph Co.; 3146; The Rotograph Co. N.Y. City. (Germany.) Shows original hospital building (North Building) facing Cedar Street.

did.unittitle: New Haven Hospital, New Haven, Connecticut

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Color; message; stamp; postmarked 1906. Message written by a nurse at the hospital. Inscription: 663; Made in Germany. A.C. Basselman & Co., New York.

did.unittitle: New Haven Hospital, View from Congress Ave. New Haven, Connecticut

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Color. Inscription: 16.; Printed in Germany. K. V. G. G. Lange B. L. Schwalbach; New England series a. Shows Gifford Wing and Farnam Amphitheater.

did.unittitle: New Haven Hospital, New Haven, Connecticut

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Color; message dated 1908; stamp. Inscription: 663; Made in Germany. A.C. Basselman & Co., New York.

did.unittitle: New Haven Hospital. New Haven, Connecticut

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Inscription: Published by the Edward P. Judd Co., New Haven, Conn. Entrance facing Howard Avenue (Clinic Building).

did.unittitle: New Haven Hospital. New Haven, Connecticut

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Color. Inscription: 15267; A "Colorpicture" publication, Cambridge, Mass., U.S.A.18; Pub. Entrance built in 1930; now the Clinic building.

did.unittitle: New Haven Hospital. New Haven, Connecticut

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Color with white border; message; stamp; postmarked 1937. Inscription: 18; Pub. by The Harold Hahn Co., Inc, New Haven, Connecticut. Shows the main entrance on Howard Avenue, now the Clinic Building.

did.unittitle: New Haven Orphan Asylum. New Haven, Connecticut

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Color. Inscription: 216490; Pub. by Danziger & Berman, New Haven, Connecticut No. 670. Printed in United States.

did.unittitle: Nurses' Home and Quarters of the P. H. S. (Public Health Services) Hospital No 41. West Haven, Connecticut

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Inscription: Published by Morris Berman, New Haven, Connecticut.

corpname.part: P. H. S. (Public Health Services) Hospital No 41. (West Haven, Connecticut)

did.unittitle: Hospital of St Raphael. New Haven, Connecticut

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Color. Inscription: No. 2167. Pub. by Danziger & Berman, New Haven, Connecticut.

did.unittitle: Edward S. Harkness Memorial Hall, School of Medicine, Yale University. New Haven, Connecticut

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Color. Inscription: C. T. Alburtus, Photographer; copyright 1966 Yale University. Harkness Hall to the left, Harkness Dormitory to the right.

did.unittitle: Institute of Human Relations and Sterling Hall of Medicine, Yale University. New Haven, Connecticut

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Inscription: Published by the Edward P. Judd Co., New Haven, Connecticut

corpname.part: Yale University. Institute of Human Relations

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Color with white borders; message; stamp, postmarked 1932. Inscription: 34810; Pub. by the Harold Hahn Co., Inc., New Haven, Connecticut; Made in USA.

corpname.part: Yale University. Institute of Human Relations

did.unittitle: Laboratory of Epidemiology and Public Health, Yale University . New Haven, Connecticut

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Color. Inscription: C. T. Alburtus, Photographer; copyright 1965 Yale University.

corpname.part: Yale University. Department of Epidemiology and Public Health

did.unittitle: Medical School, Yale University. New Haven, Connecticut

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Color. Inscription: Publ. by Danziger & Berman, New Haven, Connecticut; No. 213; Made in Germany. The Medical School at 150 York Street.

did.unittitle: Old Sheffield Hall, Yale University. New Haven, Connecticut

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Color. Inscription: 533; Pub. by Danziger & Berman. New Haven, Conn. Located at the corner of Grove and Prospect Streets; original building was the home of the Medical Instituion of Yale College; building no longer standing.

did.unittitle: Entrance to Sterling Hall of Medicine, Yale University. New Haven, Connecticut

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Color. Inscription: Chris Color Cards, P.O. Box 3974, New Haven CT 06525; 926-E; MWM Dexter/ Aurora, Missouri/ U.S.A.

did.unittitle: Sterling Hall of Medicine, Yale School of Medicine. New Haven, Connecticut

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: No publisher information. Inscription: Sterling Hall of Medicine (1924) on Cedar Street; part of the Yale-New Haven Medical Center.

did.unittitle: Home Memorial Hospital. New London, Connecticut

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Color. Inscription: 30800; Pub. by J. Solomon, New London, Connecticut; Made in USA.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Color with white borders. Inscription: 91525; C.T. American Art.

did.unittitle: Hospital and Nurses' Home. Norwalk, Connecticut

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Color. Inscription: 26963; Pub. by Harold Hahn, New Haven, Connecticut; Made in U.S.A.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Color with white border; message; stamp. Inscription: 7A-H3837; "C.T. Art-Colortone"; Reg. U.S. Pat. Off. Made Only by Curt Teich & Co., Inc., Chicago; American Art Post Card, Co., Boston, Mass.

did.unittitle: The William W. Backus Hospital. Norwich, Connecticut

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Color; message; stamp; postmarked 1914. Inscription: Published expressly for F. W. Woolworth Co, Made in U.S.A.; C.T. Photochrom.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Color. Inscription: A- 73846; C.T. American Art.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Color background; addressed to Dr. A. P. Mason; stamp; postmarked 1923. Inscription on front: 50 minutes from New York City. Inscription on reverse: For mental and nervous diseases, also cases of alcoholism and general invalidism, for terms and other information, address F. H. Barnes, M.D. Long distance telephone, Stamford 1867.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Message; stamp; postmarked 1907. Inscription on front: A sanitarium for the treatment of nervous and mild mental diseases with a separate department for the treatment of alcoholic and drug addiction.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Color with white borders. Inscription: A-72636; C.T. American Art.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Inscription: August Schmelzer, Meriden, Connecticut.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Color. Inscription: 222014; Pub. by the August Schmelzer Co., Meriden, Connecticut No. 118.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Color with white borders; address; stamp; postmarked 1935. Inscription: 8277; Pub by the Harold Hahn Co., Inc., New Haven, Connecticut; Made in USA.

did.unittitle: General Medical and Surgical Unit of Veterans Administration Hospital. West Haven, Connecticut

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Inscription: 9B; Gramaton Art Company, Mt. Vernon, New York; Genuine CurtTeich-Chicago "Art-Colortone" Post Card (Reg. U.S. Pat. Off.); 3C-H490

corpname.part: Veterans Administration Hospital Medical Center (West Haven, Conn.)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Color. Inscription: Published by Danziger & Berman, New Haven, Connecticut; Made in U.S.A.; A-36716; C.T. American Art.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Color; message; stamp; postmarked 1908. Inscription: Publ. by A. H. Johnson, Willimantic, Conn.; No. 88; Made in Germany.

did.unittitle: Windham Community Memorial Hospital. Willimantic, Connecticut

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Color with white borders. Inscription: 77210; Pub. by Kaufman News Co., Norwich, Connecticut; "Tichnor Quality Views" Reg. U.S. Pat. Off.; Made only by Tichnor Bros., Inc. Boston, Mass.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Handcolored; windows and building highlighted with bright paint. Inscription: Published for the Art Store, Winsted, Connecticut (15679); Reichner Bros. Leipzig. Munchen.

corpname.part: Yale Medical Library Associates (New Haven, Connecticut)

did.unittitle: Bust of Harvey Cushing by Malvina Hoffman, Historical Library, Yale Medical Library. New Haven, Connecticut

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Inscription: Reproduced for Associates of the Yale Medical Library; Printed by The Meriden Gravure Company, Meriden, Conn. The bust of Cushing is in the Reading Room of the Historical Library.

did.unittitle: A Connecticut Pharmacy, mid-19th century, Yale Medical Library. New Haven, Connecticut

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Inscription: Gift of Edward Clark Streeter; Reproduced for Associates of the Yale Medical Library; Printed by The Meriden Gravure Company, Meriden, Conn. The pharmacy was removed from the lobby outside the medical library at the time of a major library renovation circa 1989.

did.unittitle: Historical Library, Yale Medical Library. New Haven, Connecticut

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Inscription: Reproduced for the Associates of the Yale Medical Library; Printed by The Meridian Gravure Company, Meriden, Connecticut.

did.unittitle: Paneth Codex, 14th Century Medical MS Gift of Associates of the Yale Medical Library

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Inscription: Printed by The Meriden Gravure Company, Meriden, Conn. The Paneth Codex (MS 28) was acquired in 1955 with funds raised for the purpose by the Library Associates.

did.unittitle: Reading Room, Yale Medical Library. New Haven, Connecticut

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Inscription: Reproduced for Associates of the Yale Medical Library; Printed by The Meriden Gravure Compnay, Meriden, Conn. Now the Morse Reading Room.

did.unittitle: The Rotunda, Yale Medical Library. New Haven, Connecticut

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Inscription: Dedicated to Harvey Cushing; Reproduced for Associates of the Yale Medical Library; Printed by The Meriden Gravure Company, Meriden, Conn.

did.unittitle: Left Wing, US Army General Hospital, No 16. New Haven, Connecticut

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: No inscription.
